team_name: JudgeAI: Intelligent Court Judgment Analyzer & Compliance Action Engine
summary: Build an AI system that processes court judgment PDFs, extracts key information, generates structured action plans, and ensures human-verified data is presented in a dashboard for government use.
optimization_claims: Extracts and structures all critical actions in under 30 seconds.
Enables faster, safer, and more reliable decision-making for government departments.
constraints_addressed: Must handle complex, inconsistent legal PDFs
Outputs must be explainable and verifiable
Focus on decision support, not full automation
